chapter_title.en: Chapter 44 – Penalty (Hadd) of the children regarding the theft

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) الصِّبْيَانُ إِذَا أُتِيَ بِهِمْ عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) قَطَعَ أَنَامِلَهُمْ مِنْ أَيْنَ قَطَعَ فَقَالَ مِنَ الْمَفْصِلِ مَفْصِلِ الْأَنَامِلِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Safwan, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, said,

‘I said to Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), ‘The children, when they came with them, Ali<sup>asws</sup> cut their fingertips from where did he<sup>asws</sup> cut?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘From the joints, the joints of the fingertips’.
